Blog
Podcast

Book A Call
You’ve done a lot right already.  Now, you need an upgrade to streamline and optimize with a team that does it all—equity compensation, financial planning, tax, and investments. Relax, we got this.
Book A Call
Without BKFi
Seeking Answers and Validation
You’ve been doing this on your own (and you’re not a financial advisor), but you need answers. Plus, you’re too busy to juggle all the components of your finances. You hope you’re doing all the right things, but you’re not sure what you’re missing.
Looming Tax Worries and Complications
You’re doing well financially, but you’re afraid of a huge tax bill and don’t know what to do about it.
Finger Pointing and Juggling
Playing phone tag between your accountant, tax preparer, and financial advisor is exhausting—all while hoping nothing falls through the cracks.
Overwhelmed by Equity Decisions
You feel overwhelmed by stock options, RSUs, and complex equity decisions while HR says, "Ask your tax advisor."
You Don’t Love Your Current Advisor
Working with advisors who don't understand your world, rarely reach out to you, or talk down to you about money makes you feel frustrated. You’re crossing your fingers that someone is proactively watching your investments and thinking about tax implications.
With BKFi
One Team, Many Solutions
One coordinated team handling everything: tax prep, investing, financial planning, and equity decisions that talk to each other so you don't have to.
Equity Expertise Meets Strategy
A tech-savvy partner who gets your equity compensation and can tell you when to trade your employee stock (and even trade for you) that optimizes both your taxes and your long-term wealth.
Clear Advice from Real People
People who can explain complex financial concepts clearly and actually want you to understand what's happening with your money. Regular, proactive updates on your portfolio and market changes in plain English.
Quick Answers When You Need Them
A team you can contact when you need a quick answer about exercising options or buying a house. Plus, 24/7 access to your financial dashboard to check your progress toward goals.
Expert Bench and Trusted Network
A deep bench of CFP® s, CPAs, and ECAs who eat, sleep, and breathe this stuff. Plus, a Rolodex of vetted experts for anything we don't handle directly.
Your wealth is complex. Working with us isn't.
Whether navigating your first IPO, a major life change, or managing multi-generational wealth, we've got your back with the expertise you need.
Meet the Team
HOW WILL YOU
GROW WITH BKFI?
We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Instead, we offer distinct service blueprints designed to match where you are in your unique financial journey and grow alongside your evolving needs.
Start Up
For professionals focused on building wealth strategically.
What's Included:
Financial planning & thought partner
Dedicated CFP® professional who gets you
Major life event guidance
Cohesive investment management
Inheritance & windfall planning
May Be Right For:
Early-career professionals
Pre-liquidity startup employees
Under $1M investable assets
Future wealth builders
Core
For established professionals looking to optimize and protect their wealth.
What's Included:
Financial planning & thought partner
Dedicated CFP® professional who gets you
6-month tax forecasting
Cohesive investment management
Estate planning
Strategy optimization
May Be Right For:
Mid-senior professionals
$1M-$10M investable assets
Complex equity holders
Tax strategy seekers
Private
For individuals navigating significant wealth with complex planning needs.
What's Included:
All core offerings
Personal & trust tax filing
Annual in-person planning for goal alignment
Family wealth support
External advisor coordination
May Be Right For:
$10M+ investable assets
Pre-liquidity executives
Multi-generational families
Complex wealth scenarios
Get Started
WHAT ABOUT THE COST OF OUR FINANCIAL SERVICES?
At BKFi, we value transparency and authentic conversations. That’s why we put the pricing right on our website.
View Our Pricing
We’ve helped numerous companies navigate their equity and benefits.
HEAR FROM OUR CLIENTS
slide 4 of 4
Despite the dramatic ups and downs of my company's stock post-IPO, I'm calm and grateful knowing we've built a trading plan that will support our big-picture financial goals.
Jackson and Holly
Brooklyn Fi got to know us and our goals, they utilize easy to use tooling and checklists, and somehow have managed to make the whole process (dare I say it) fun! Looking forward to continuing to work with their team!
Erin and Ryan
Brooklyn Fi has completely revolutionized financial planning. By providing us with a financial plan completely tailored to our lifestyle and our needs, we have the confidence that we can meet our goals and do it in a way that works for us! Also, their podcast is fire. Thanks, BKFi!
Sharrifah and Paige
Denver, Colorado
From my very first conversation with my planner and every conversation since, I've experienced an unbelievable level of support, expertise, and guidance. We immediately came up with a plan to address the most pressing issues while also looking ahead to the kind of life I wanted to build - something I had never stopped to ask myself. I didn't expect financial planning to be such a personal, emotional journey, and I could not be more thankful to be in the hands of BKFI.

Brooklyn Fi, LLC is a New York-based Investment Advisor registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission. Registration does not imply a certain level of skill or training. The presence of this website on the Internet shall not be directly or indirectly interpreted as a solicitation of investment advisory services to persons of another jurisdiction unless otherwise permitted by statute. Follow-up or individualized responses to consumers in a particular state by Brooklyn Fi in the rendering of personalized investment advice for compensation shall not be made without our first complying with jurisdiction requirements or pursuant an applicable state exemption.
The publication of any awards, ratings, or accolades received by the firm are not to be viewed by clients, or prospective clients, as a guarantee of future results or experiences with Brooklyn FI, LLC and are not reflective of the exact service experience or results of any one client.
All written content on this site is for information purposes only. Opinions expressed herein are solely those of Brooklyn Fi, unless otherwise specifically cited. Material presented is believed to be from reliable sources and no representations are made by our firm as to other parties’ informational accuracy or completeness. All information or ideas provided should be discussed in detail with an advisor, accountant or legal counsel prior to implementation.
All testimonials and/or endorsements have been provided by real current and/or former clients. No current or former client was compensated, directly or indirectly, for providing these statements. Brooklyn FI, LLC gained each client's permission to publish their testimonial/endorsement.
